name: react-performance
description: React performance assistant for profiling, render optimization, memoization review, list tuning, and validation guidance.

interface.shortDescription: React profiling, render optimization, and validation guidance.
interface.longDescription: React performance assistant for profiling, render optimization, memoization review, list tuning, and validation guidance. Helps Codex diagnose slow renders, reduce unnecessary re-renders, stabilize props, virtualize lists, and validate improvements with profiling evidence.
